message:
refactor(tests): rename window test, simplify conformance test signatures

- Rename test_conformance_window_functions_basic to
  test_conformance_window_functions_partitioned (more descriptive)
- Convert test_conformance_type_coercion_deep from Result<(), String>
  return to plain unit test (matches other conformance tests)
- Remove Ok(()) returns and setup_oracle_pair() usage, use direct
  Connection::open/rusqlite::Connection::open_in_memory instead

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
